texto: I've realized that everything is about relationships. I've witnessed that ultimately you can't take what you don't give because there is a master bookkeeper out there who keeps accounts balanced. This fundamental link between man, plants, and the earth has been documented since the dawn of civilization.
explicacao: Citação de Vivian Elisabeth Glyck sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I've realized that everything is about relationships. I've witnessed that ultimately you can't ta…” articula saude-mental, balance, karma em registro de saude mental, com relevância para contextos como karma e life-lesson.
